title: indigofera griseoides subsp. griseoides
intro: Indigofera griseoides subsp. griseoides, also known as the blue mountain pea, is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the legume family (Fabaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Indigofera griseoides subsp. griseoides include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Indigofera griseoides subsp. griseoides include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems of the plant in hot water or a solvent.
